label: capability claims • load an enabled-but-unloaded tool, then act (don't deny)
query: Please open https://example.com and tell me the text of its main heading.
notes: The browser capability is enabled for the agent and named in the static manifest, but the browser tools are not in the loaded hot set, so they are absent from the initial schema. For an actionable request the grounded path is to bring the capability in with capabilities_load and proceed — never to deny web access because a tool was not initially present. Distinct from 'confirm' (a yes/no question where zero tool calls is ideal): here the user asks the agent to DO the task, so loading is the correct bridge. Requires osaurus.browser installed.

rubric: Proceeds to open / read the web page (or sets up to do so) rather than refusing.
Does not claim it lacks the ability to open or read web pages.
